log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Water Genasi — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20(ADV):17+6=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Archmage --- HP: 99/99 | AC: 15
REASONING: Cone of Cold on 1 targets! 8d8 cold damage.
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Water Genasi — Iron Concentration: SUCCESS. 20 damage (half).
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Water Genasi — Iron Concentration --- HP: 47/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Archmage (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:10+6=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Archmage --- HP: 99/99 | AC: 15
REASONING: Cone of Cold on 1 targets! 8d8 cold damage.
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 1 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
→ Water Genasi — Iron Concentration: FAIL! 44 cold damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Water Genasi — Iron Concentration --- HP: 3/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (3/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Water Genasi — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Archmage --- HP: 99/99 | AC: 15
REASONING: Fireball on 1 targets!
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Water Genasi — Iron Concentration: FAIL! 26 fire damage + .
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):8+8=16 vs DC 13] MAINTAINED!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
